argsTemplate: -NoProfile -Command "Get-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online | Where-Object State -eq Enabled | Select-Object FeatureName | Format-Table -AutoSize"
-NoProfile -Command "(New-Object -ComObject Microsoft.Update.AutoUpdate).DetectNow(); Write-Output 'Triggered a Windows Update scan.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Stop-Service -Name wuauserv,bits,cryptsvc -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Rename-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:SystemRoot 'SoftwareDistribution') -NewName 'SoftwareDistribution.bak' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Rename-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:SystemRoot 'System32\catroot2') -NewName 'catroot2.bak' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service -Name wuauserv,bits,cryptsvc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Windows Update components reset.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (-not (Get-Process -Name explorer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process explorer }; Write-Output 'Explorer restarted.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:LocalAppData 'IconCache.db') -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:LocalAppData 'Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\iconcache_*.db') -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process explorer; Write-Output 'Icon cache cleared.'"
-NoProfile -Command "netsh winsock reset; netsh int ip reset; ipconfig /flushdns; Write-Output 'Network stack reset. A restart is recommended.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\VolumeCaches' | ForEach-Object { New-ItemProperty -Path $_.PSPath -Name 'StateFlags0001' -Value 2 -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null }; Start-Process -FilePath cleanmgr -ArgumentList '/sagerun:1' -Wait; Write-Output 'Disk Cleanup finished.'"

-NoProfile -Command "$p = Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'Windows.old'; if (Test-Path $p) { takeown /f $p /r /d y | Out-Null; icacls $p /grant '*S-1-5-32-544:F' /t /c | Out-Null; Remove-Item -Path $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Windows.old removed.' } else { Write-Output 'No Windows.old folder found.' }"

-NoProfile -Command "Stop-Service -Name wuauserv -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:SystemRoot 'SoftwareDistribution\Download\*') -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service -Name wuauserv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Windows Update cache cleared.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*','HKLM:\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*' | Where-Object DisplayName | Select-Object DisplayName,DisplayVersion,Publisher | Sort-Object DisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize"

-NoProfile -Command "$p='HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Themes\Personalize'; Set-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name AppsUseLightTheme -Value 0 -Type DWord; Set-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name SystemUsesLightTheme -Value 0 -Type DWord; Write-Output 'Dark mode enabled.'"

-NoProfile -Command "$p='HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Themes\Personalize'; Set-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name AppsUseLightTheme -Value 1 -Type DWord; Set-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name SystemUsesLightTheme -Value 1 -Type DWord; Write-Output 'Light mode enabled.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' -Name TaskbarAl -Value 0 -Type DWord; Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (-not (Get-Process -Name explorer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process explorer }; Write-Output 'Taskbar aligned to the left.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' -Name TaskbarAl -Value 1 -Type DWord; Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (-not (Get-Process -Name explorer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process explorer }; Write-Output 'Taskbar aligned to the center.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' -Name ShowSecondsInSystemClock -Value 1 -Type DWord; Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (-not (Get-Process -Name explorer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process explorer }; Write-Output 'Seconds shown in the system clock.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' -Name ShowSecondsInSystemClock -Value 0 -Type DWord; Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (-not (Get-Process -Name explorer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process explorer }; Write-Output 'Seconds hidden from the system clock.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:LocalAppData 'Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\thumbcache_*.db') -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process explorer; Write-Output 'Thumbnail cache cleared.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Stop-Service -Name FontCache -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:SystemRoot 'ServiceProfiles\LocalService\AppData\Local\FontCache\*') -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service -Name FontCache -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Font cache cleared.'"
-NoProfile -Command "try { 'Secure Boot enabled: ' + (Confirm-SecureBootUEFI) } catch { 'Secure Boot not available (legacy BIOS or unsupported).' }"

-NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem | Format-List Manufacturer,Model,SystemFamily,TotalPhysicalMemory; Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Format-List Caption,Version,InstallDate"

-NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:SystemRoot 'Minidump\*') -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:SystemRoot 'MEMORY.DMP') -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Crash dumps cleared.'"
-NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'Microsoft\Windows\WER\*') -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Windows Error Reporting data cleared.'"
-NoProfile -Command "ipconfig /flushdns | Out-Null; arp -d * 2>$null; Write-Output 'DNS and ARP caches cleared.'"

-NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance -Namespace root\wmi -ClassName BatteryStaticData -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object DesignedCapacity; Get-CimInstance -Namespace root\wmi -ClassName BatteryFullChargedCapacity -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullChargedCapacity | Format-List"
-NoProfile -Command "Resolve-DnsName -Name microsoft.com -Server 8.8.8.8 -Type A -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize"

-NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance -Namespace root\wmi -ClassName MSStorageDriver_FailurePredictStatus -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object InstanceName,PredictFailure,Reason | Format-Table -AutoSize"
